rulings.Case Title: CONSERVATORSHIP OF DAMISELA VADO
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES
rulings.Rulings: continued to june 6, 2017. as stated in the response to the examiner's notes, the Conservator discovered an additional asset after the final inventory was filed in june of 2016. No date was given for the discovery, but the premium was paid in august of 2016, so the Conservator knew of the asset at that time. It still has not been inventoried. the life insurance policy must be inventoried and the accounting must be amended to include it.
